summary: Phase 3f kickoff — DB seed expansion for Passerini (4->7), Ugi (4->7), Stille (4->7). 9 new application_example extracts (18 queryable molecules) inserted into labint.db. Extracts ids 1549-1557. Rebuilt benchmark JSONs (extracts_scanned 1204->1213). Ran adm/brd/cov. Result: ALL 9 METRICS IDENTICAL to 3g-5 baseline — zero regression, zero gain. Top5 for every targeted failing case (Passerini 1126/1127, Ugi 1345/1346, Stille 1306/1307) is byte-identical to 3g-5. Diagnosis: new seeds did not clear the fingerprint-similarity ceiling vs greedy-family candidates (Aldol for 1126, Lieben Haloform for 1127, Heck for 1306, Friedel-Crafts for 1307). The family-generic variant approach is not sharp enough to flip aggregate fingerprint scores against greedy families that already contain high-similarity candidate rows.

change_lines.smiles_guard_sn: Added 'Sn' to BRACKET_ALLOWED_ATOMS set; tin was missing (legacy Stille id=699 was ingested before guard, also fails current guard).
change_lines.passerini_new_rows: id=1549 furfural+cyclohexanecarboxylic acid+ethyl-NC; id=1550 pentanal+propionic acid+cyclohexyl-NC; id=1551 4-methoxybenzaldehyde+benzoic acid+n-butyl-NC
change_lines.ugi_new_rows: id=1552 nicotinaldehyde+EtNH2+AcOH+cyclohexyl-NC; id=1553 4-F-benzaldehyde+MeNH2+pivalic acid+benzyl-NC; id=1554 acetone+allylamine+AcOH+2,6-xylyl-NC

strict_non_regression_status: PASS — all 9 metrics == 3g-5 baseline; 0 improved, 9 unchanged, 0 regressed
diagnostic_journey: Dry-run gated by smiles_guard: 3 Stille tin seeds rejected with bracket_atom_unusual_suffix:n. Root cause — Sn missing from BRACKET_ALLOWED_ATOMS. Legacy Stille id=699 (CC=[CH][Sn]([CH3])([CH3])[CH3]) also fails current guard → Sn was never whitelisted; id=699 was ingested pre-guard.

Patched smiles_guard.py: added 'Sn' to BRACKET_ALLOWED_ATOMS with comment referencing Phase 3f Stille need and legacy id=699. Verified all 4 Sn-containing SMILES pass and sanity cases (bogus '[Qq]', [NH4+]) behave as before.
Dry-run clean: 9/9 seeds would insert (ids 1549-1557). Live run: +18 queryable molecules, Passerini/Ugi/Stille each 4->7 rows.

Rebuilt 3 benchmark JSONs with --db app/labint.db. Case counts stable (259/259/518) as expected — coverage --sample-per-family=2 cap prevents new extracts from becoming test cases; they enrich the candidate corpus.
Ran 3 benchmarks. adm=197/0.7606, brd=197/0.7606, cov=0.7317/0.8378/0.8842 — all IDENTICAL to 3g-5 baseline.
Diff analysis (diff_3f_vs_3g5.py): top5 for all 6 target failing cases (Passerini 1126/1127, Ugi 1345/1346, Stille 1306/1307) is byte-identical vs 3g-5. Zero hit-flag changes across 518 cases.

Interpretation: adding family-generic variants does not clear the min_tanimoto=0.25 threshold sharply enough to flip aggregate family scores against greedy families that already contain high-similarity candidate rows (e.g. Aldol's 12 rows already fingerprint-match Passerini_1126's benzaldehyde+AcOH components; adding 3 Passerini variants doesn't overcome this).

roi_analysis.3f_1: 0 cases gained — same exhaustion signal as 3g-5
roi_analysis.interpretation: Both demotion (3g-5) and generic-variant enrichment (3f-1) have hit ROI=0. To move MCR/Stille top1/top5 further would require either (a) query-mirror seeds crafted per failing case (e.g. for 1126: acetic acid + benzaldehyde + alternate NC so seed fingerprint matches query fingerprint directly), or (b) predictor-side family-boost for MCR families instead of demoting competitors — both carry higher regression risk than the zero-risk path of shipping defensive DB density.
roi_analysis.shipping_decision: KEEP 3f-1 DB rows despite zero gain — they are strictly non-regressive, chemically valid, and expand the Passerini/Ugi/Stille corpus from 4->7 rows each which may help future as-yet-unseen queries. Also retain Sn whitelist fix (one-line defensible chemistry change).

smoke_tests: smiles_guard Sn whitelist — 4 tin-containing SMILES pass (3 new seeds + legacy id=699); bogus '[Qq]' still rejected
Dry-run rollback semantics — before/after counts identical with dry_run=True
Live insert — Passerini 4->7, Ugi 4->7, Stille 4->7 verified via DB read (verify_3f_ingest.py)
next_steps: Option A (safe, zero-ROI): declare optimization loop paused here; 3f-1 + 3g-5 anti-greed guards form the current ceiling.

Option B (3f-2 query-mirror): author per-case mirror seeds (e.g. for 1126: AcOH + PhCHO + iPr-NC variant) to make fingerprint similarity directly outcompete Aldol. Risk: these may look like near-duplicates of existing failing cases — need to verify they add genuine novelty.
Option C (predictor boost): add Passerini/Ugi/Stille family-score boost in evidence_search when isocyanide/tin features present. Higher regression risk than demotion-only.
Recommendation: ask user which direction before spending another iteration.
